text: {"is_complete": false, "next_step": {"type": "file_upload", "prompt_text": "Thanks. Your declared income (RM 3,500/month) is in the B40 band, which qualifies you for need-based scholarships. Please upload one piece of income proof so we can verify — any of: parents' EPF statement, latest payslip (3 months), or Surat Pengesahan Pendapatan from your village head if parents are in informal sector.", "config": {"accepts": ["application/pdf", "image/*"], "max_files": 1, "extraction_schema": {"document_type": "Type of income proof document", "estimated_monthly_income_rm": "Estimated monthly family income in RM", "income_tier_inferred": "B40 / M40 / T20 based on amount"}}}, "reasoning": "Income tier B40 confirmed by self-declaration. SOP requires verifiable income proof for Yayasan UM. Accepting all three common formats per SOP §Document Checklist.", "running_summary": "B40 student, CGPA 3.10, non-Bumiputera. Awaiting income proof.", "citations": ["Document Checklist", "Yayasan UM Pathway"]}
